---
id: get-eth
title: "Get Eth"
description: "This API used to retrieve ethernet configuration details. Security features, static IP configuration, and IPv6 support are not available in the current API version."
sidebar_label: "Get Eth"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "post api-method"
info_path: docs/api/gen-2-x-api-reference
custom_edit_url: null
hide_send_button: true
---

import ParamsDetails from "@theme/ParamsDetails";
import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";
import StatusCodes from "@theme/StatusCodes";
import OperationTabs from "@theme/OperationTabs";
import TabItem from "@theme/TabItem";
import Heading from "@theme/Heading";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Get Eth"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/get_eth"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



This API used to retrieve ethernet configuration details. Security features, static IP configuration, and IPv6 support are not available in the current API version.

<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
  children={"Request"}
>
</Heading>

<ParamsDetails
  parameters={undefined}
>
  
</ParamsDetails>

<RequestSchema
  title={"Body"}
  body={{"required":true,"content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"type":"object","properties":{"command":{"type":"string","example":"get_eth","description":"Command issued to get the ethernet configuration"},"requestId":{"type":"string","example":"abc123","description":"A unique identifier for the request, allowing tracking and debugging of the operation."}},"required":["command","requestId"]}}}}}
>
  
</RequestSchema>

<StatusCodes
  id={undefined}
  label={undefined}
  responses={{"default":{"description":"get_eth response","content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"type":"object","properties":{"command":{"type":"string","example":"get_eth"},"requestId":{"type":"string","example":"abc123"},"apiVersion":{"type":"string","example":"V1.1","enum":["V1.0","V1.1"]},"ethConfig":{"title":"ethConfig","x-stoplight":{"id":"jo5vgcsotp2jr"},"type":"object","properties":{"interfaceDetails":{"type":"object","properties":{"interfaceName":{"type":"string","example":"eth0","description":"Name of the network interface."},"status":{"type":"string","example":"enabled","enum":["enabled","disabled"],"description":"Status of the network interface."},"hostname":{"type":"string","example":"RFD40AB03","description":"Hostname assigned to the device."},"macAddress":{"type":"string","example":"E0-D0-45-3D-38-1D","description":"MAC address of the network interface."},"linkStatus":{"type":"object","properties":{"status":{"type":"string","enum":["Connected","Disconnected"],"example":"Connected","description":"Current status of the network link."},"linkSpeed":{"type":"string","example":"100Mbps","description":"Speed of the network link."}},"required":["status","linkSpeed"]},"ipv4Configuration":{"type":"object","properties":{"ipAddress":{"type":"string","example":"192.168.1.81","format":"ipv4","description":"IPv4 address of the network interface."},"subnetMask":{"type":"string","example":"255.255.255.0","format":"ipv4","description":"Subnet mask for the IPv4 configuration."},"gateway":{"type":"string","example":"192.168.1.144","format":"ipv4","description":"Gateway address for the IPv4 configuration."},"enableDhcp":{"type":"boolean","enum":["enabled","disabled"],"example":"enabled","description":"Indicates if DHCP is enabled for IPv4 configuration."},"dnsServer":{"type":"string","format":"ipv4","example":"192.168.1.78","description":"DNS server address for the IPv4 configuration."},"domainName":{"type":"string","example":"test.soti.com","description":"Domain name for the IPv4 configuration."}}},"ipv6Configuration":{"type":"object","properties":{"ipAddress":{"type":"string","example":"fe80::1643:8376:b32:4a16","format":"ipv6","description":"IPv6 address of the network interface."},"prefix":{"type":"integer","example":"64","description":"Prefix length for the IPv6 configuration."},"gateway":{"type":"string","example":"2a02:1234:420a:100b::99","format":"ipv6","description":"Gateway address for the IPv6 configuration."},"enableAuto":{"type":"boolean","example":true,"description":"Indicates if auto-configuration is enabled for IPv6."},"dnsServer":{"type":"string","example":"2001:4860:4860::9999","format":"ipv6","description":"DNS server address for the IPv6 configuration."},"domainName":{"type":"string","example":"test.soti.com","description":"Domain name for the IPv6 configuration."}}},"security":{"type":"object","properties":{"securityStatus":{"type":"boolean","example":true,"description":"Indicates if security features are enabled."},"EAP802_1X":{"type":"object","properties":{"authentication":{"type":"string","enum":["EAP-MD5","LEAP","PEAP","EAP-SIM","EAP-AKA","EAP-TLS","EAP-TTLS","EAP-FAST"],"example":"PEAP","description":"Authentication method for 802.1X security."},"innerAuthentication":{"type":"string","example":"EAP-MS-CHAPv2","enum":["EAP-MS-CHAPv2"," EAP-TLS","EAP-GTC"],"description":"Inner authentication method for 802.1X security."},"certificate":{"type":"string","example":"client45","description":"Certificate used for 802.1X authentication."}}}}}},"required":["interfaceName","status","hostname","macAddress"]}},"description":"Detailed schema for Ethernet configuration."},"response":{"title":"response","x-stoplight":{"id":"1uzw0wye4si2y"},"type":"object","properties":{"code":{"type":"integer","example":0,"description":"Response codes:\n\n| Code | Meaning |\n| --- | --- |\n| 0 | Success |\n| 1 | Command payload is accepted |\n| 2 | Invalid payload |\n| 3 | Not able to retrieve information |\n| 4 | Firmware update in progress |\n| 5 | Can't reboot device, inventory in progress |\n| 6 | Region is not configured |\n| 7 | Interface is not available |\n| 8 | Insufficient flash size |\n| 9 | File not found |\n| 10 | Configuration already exists |\n| 11 | Inventory in progress |\n| 12 | No Radio Operation in Progress |\n| 13 | Firmware update Failed |\n| 14 | Battery is low, Cannot update firmware |\n| 15 | WIFI Error - SSID not found |\n| 16 | WIFI Error - Cannot delete active SSID |\n| 17 | WIFI Error - SSID missed |\n| 18 | WIFI Error - SSID already exist |\n| 19 | WIFI Error - SSID count overflow |\n| 20 | Wifi is not supported |\n| 21 | Certificate not found |\n| 22 | Advanced configuration not set |\n| 23 | Invalid enum value |\n| 24 | Max 32 prefilters limit exceeded |\n| 25 | Max 3 publish topics exceeded |\n| 26 | Max 1 subscribe topic exceeded |\n| 27 | Invalid tenant ID length |\n| 28 | Tag match pattern length exceeded |\n| 29 | Url missing for HTTP source |\n| 30 | Certificate content missing for direct source |","minimum":0,"maximum":30},"description":{"type":"string","description":"response description in detail","example":"Success"}},"required":["code","description"]}}},"examples":{"Ethernet config info":{"description":"Response with ethernet interface configuration details","value":{"command":"get_eth","requestId":"abc123","apiVersion":"V1.1","ethconfig":{"InterfaceDetails":{"interfaceName":"eth0","status":"Enabled","hostName":"RFD40-211545201D0020","macAddress":"AC:3F:A4:00:2C:89","linkStatus":{"status":"Connected","linkSpeed":"100Mbps"},"ipv4Configuration":{"ipAddress":"192.168.0.101","subnetMask":"255.255.255.0","gateway":"192.168.0.1","enableDhcp":true,"dnsServer":"0.0.0.0","domainName":"zebra.com"}}},"response":{"code":0,"description":"Success"}}},"Ethernet interface disabled":{"description":"Response when ethernet interface is disabled on the device","value":{"command":"get_eth","requestId":"abc123","apiVersion":"V1.1","ethConfig":{"interfaceDetails":{"interfaceName":"eth0","status":"Disabled"}},"response":{"code":0,"description":"Success"}}}}}}}}}
>
